ideation: This animation sequence simulates the action of pressing a play button. The right arm extends forward, then taps a button, then returns to rest. The left arm remains at rest. The robot's arm doesn't have an elbow, so the movement is simple, using the two shoulder joints to simulate the pointing and pressing action. The sequence will have 5 frames to show the action clearly.

frames.beat: both arms rest at the sides
right arm reaches forward, ready to press
fingers tap the play button firmly
the arm retracts slightly, confirming press
both arms return to a resting state
